entry.title: New: CC 25-11 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
WATER AND INFRASTRUCTURE CHAIR, transmitting a proposed amendment to Resolution 25-86, entitled "ACCEPTING DEDICATION OF ROADWAY LOTS FOR THE KAIMANA AT KEHALANI SUBDIVISION (KEHALANI MAKAI), KEHALANI MAKUA (LARGE-LOT) SUBDIVISIONS, ILIAHI AT KEHALANI ROADWAY LOT SUBDIVISION AND FOR THE SUBDIVISION OF SITE C-1/11 OF WAILUKU PROJECT DISTRICT SITUATED IN WAILUKU, MAUI, HAWAII, PURSUANT TO SECTION 3.44.015, MAUI COUNTY CODE."

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
